environment: sandboxed linux workspace; no credentials provisioned; operator hold ACTIVE
method_note: No PASS in this document is based on documentation, screenshots, agent assertions, or a prior summary. Every PASS and every FAIL below was produced by an executed command whose output is quoted.

AUDIT_01.scope: North Star definition, acceptance criteria, traceability, goal-percentage derivation, founder-gate separation
commands_executed: python3 AST/regex extraction of WORKSTREAMS statuses

findings.title: Four competing North Stars. No single unambiguous goal.

evidence.config/goal_completion_contract.json: north_star = 'Accelerate time-to-value for all factories...' (goal_id HAS-HASF-FULL-BUILDOUT)
evidence.has_live_project_tracker/data/northstar_: goal = 'Launch HSF Story Studio as a paid product' (ts 2026-07-07, 5 days STALE)
evidence.has_hasf_brain_unified_goal_contract.jso: terminal_goal = 'Ship a monetizable HAS/HASF product to app stores...' — and it claims to have reconciled THREE prior definitions (G-0 RESOLVED), yet northstar_state.json still disagrees with it
evidence.HELM Council mission: H1 single-run frontier proof — a fifth workstream with its own gates

findings.impact: Goal percentage, critical path, and blocker triage are computed against different goals. 'Percent complete' has no referent.

findings.title: Goal percentage is NOT calculated from satisfied requirements. It is the sum of weights of tasks whose status is a hardcoded string literal in Python source.

evidence.backend/pert_server.py:1170: completed_tasks = [t for t in WORKSTREAMS if t['status'] == 'completed']
evidence.backend/pert_server.py:1171: goal_completion_percent = round(sum(weights.get(t['id'],0.0) for t in completed_tasks),1)
evidence.WORKSTREAMS (line 149, hardcoded literal: 20 tasks — 14 'completed', 5 'pending', 1 'blocked'. No task status is derived from a passing validator, a test result, or an evidence artifact.

findings.exploit: Editing one string from 'pending' to 'completed' raises the reported goal percentage. No evidence is consulted.
findings.requirement_violated: 'Goal percentage is calculated from satisfied requirements rather than subjective estimates.'

findings.title: Three different goal percentages exist simultaneously, none evidence-derived.

evidence.pert_server computed value: sum of weights of hardcoded 'completed' tasks
evidence.LIVE API /api/pert/data: 90.0 — and this is a FALLBACK DEFAULT, not a measurement (see F-02.1)

findings.title: Blocker G-1 'K1 LLM/API credentials' is marked RESOLVED while zero credentials exist — and its dependent is still blocked on it.

evidence.goal_blocker_register.json: G-1 status=RESOLVED, severity=P0, unblock_action='Provision OPENAI_API_KEY + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'
evidence.executed existence check: OPENAI_API_KEY in env: False | ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env: False | XAI_API_KEY in env: False | .env: ABSENT
evidence.internal contradiction: G-2 status = 'BLOCKED_ON_G-1' — a RESOLVED blocker is still blocking its dependent

findings.title: Acceptance criteria are not measurable. Requirements do not map to tests, evidence, or owners.
findings.evidence: config/goal_completion_contract.json completion_definition = 12 prose statements ('Local runtime starts reliably', 'No fake PASS/ONLINE states', 'Metrics show progress to GOAL'). No requirement ID, no threshold, no validator, no evidence path, no owner on any of the 12.
findings.requirement_violated: 'Every requirement has measurable acceptance criteria' and 'Requirements map to implementation, tests, evidence, and owners.'

corrected_goal_contract.note: Proposed. Requires founder ratification — this audit does not adopt it unilaterally.
corrected_goal_contract.north_star: ONE sentence, ratified by the founder, superseding all four. Every other goal file must be deleted or explicitly marked DERIVED.
corrected_goal_contract.goal_percent_rule: goal_percent = 100 * (blocking requirements with an EXECUTED PASSING validator AND a fresh evidence artifact bound to the current code revision) / (total blocking requirements). Any requirement whose validator did not run in this revision counts as 0, never as its last known value.

requirement_schema.validator_command: the exact command that proves it
requirement_schema.evidence_path: artifact produced BY the validator, never the file making the claim
requirement_schema.evidence_freshness_sla: max age before the requirement reverts to UNKNOWN

corrected_goal_contract.founder_gate_rule: A founder gate may be marked RESOLVED only by an artifact produced OUTSIDE the ledger that records the claim, and only if that artifact is unexpired. Self-citation is inadmissible.
corrected_goal_contract.hidden_scope_found: HSF Story Studio (northstar_state.json) is tracked as the goal by one subsystem and is absent from the unified contract's terminal node.

AUDIT_02.scope: Booted the real backend locally and seeded faults. No mocks.
commands_executed: python3 -c 'from backend.main import app; count registered routes'

positive_tests_passed.test: Dependency outage — PERT calc server (:8765) down, proxy queried
positive_tests_passed.result: PASS. /api/pert/data returned HTTP 503 with {'status':'UNAVAILABLE','reason':'PERT calculation server unavailable','error':'<urlopen error [Errno 111] Connection refused>'}. It failed CLOSED and surfaced the real error. It did NOT serve a cached or default green.
PASS. /api/gateway/status honestly reports alive:false per backend rather than fabricating liveness.
PASS. /api/app-store/readiness returns 403 'Route is quarantined in HAS-only mode.'

findings.title: A MISSING data source renders the primary goal metric as 90% complete, maximally fresh, HIGH confidence, attributed to a telemetry system that never ran.
findings.executed_proof: GET http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/pert/data -> goal_completion_percent: value=90.0  source=autonomous_cadence_telemetry  freshness=0.0s  confidence=HIGH  fallback_state=90.0
findings.root_cause: backend/pert_server.py:1313 — wrap_telemetry_dict(compute_gap.get('goal_completion_percent', 90.0), 'autonomous_cadence_telemetry', ...). When compute_gap has no such key, the literal 90.0 is substituted and then STAMPED with a real-looking source, a freshness of zero, and HIGH confidence. The consumer cannot distinguish it from a measurement.
findings.scale: 94 `fallback=` sites in backend/pert_server.py. Line 1312 defaults pert_remaining_minutes to 90.0; line 1320 defaults confidence_level to '95% Confidence (PERT Beta-Distribution)' — a fabricated statistical claim.
findings.violates: 'Stale success files cannot leave the system green' and 'UNKNOWN is shown when authoritative state cannot be determined.'

findings.title: Missing timestamps are laundered into perfect freshness.
findings.evidence: backend/pert_server.py:35-47 — def wrap_telemetry_dict(value, source, last_updated_iso=None, confidence='HIGH', ...): if not last_updated_iso: last_updated_iso = datetime.now(timezone.utc). A field with NO timestamp is therefore reported with freshness=0.0s and confidence=HIGH.
findings.impact: Staleness is structurally undetectable for any field lacking a timestamp. The absence of evidence renders as the freshest possible evidence.

findings.title: Startup reports success despite a failed dependency.
findings.evidence: backend/main.py boot log: 'ERROR - Failed to load approved service nodes from registry: no such table: device_service_registry' followed by 'Application startup complete.' and a STRICT STARTUP ENVIRONMENT VERIFICATION block reporting [OK] on every dependency it checks.
findings.impact: Health = process existence, not dependency health. A process-liveness check would report ONLINE.

findings.title: The HELM Council state endpoint — the truth source for every H1B gate — IS NOT REGISTERED IN THE RUNNING APPLICATION.
findings.executed_proof: from backend.main import app -> 616 registered paths, ZERO containing 'council'. GET /api/v1/helm/council/state -> HTTP 404.
findings.cause: backend/main.py in the working tree no longer contains the endpoint (grep 'council' -> 0 matches). The uncommitted WIP that carried it — including the H1B gate fields committed in fb484a3a's integration notes — was destroyed by a concurrent lane. See F-21.4.
findings.impact: Every H1B UI gate, credential state, and decision statement is unserved. The Council view has no backend.

truth_source_hierarchy.note: AUTHORITATIVE = the only admissible source. Anything else displaying the field must be marked DERIVED and must go UNKNOWN when the authoritative source is unreachable.
truth_source_hierarchy.goal_percent: AUTHORITATIVE: a validator-derived computation over blocking requirements. TODAY: NONE EXISTS. Current value (90.0) is a fallback literal. Must render UNKNOWN.
truth_source_hierarchy.frontier_council_quorum: AUTHORITATIVE: scripts/council/aggregate.py under execution_mode=LIVE_EXTERNAL + consumed authorization. Currently false. (Code-enforced — see A22.)
truth_source_hierarchy.credential_readiness: AUTHORITATIVE: os.environ existence check. Currently NOT_PROVISIONED (all three).
truth_source_hierarchy.runtime_health: AUTHORITATIVE: live dependency probe. NOT process existence.
truth_source_hierarchy.test_results: AUTHORITATIVE: a pytest run bound to a git revision. NOT a test that reads string literals (see F-21.3).

AUDIT_21.scope: Attempted substitution, deletion, corruption, and replay against the evidence plane.

findings.title: A FALSE-GREEN TEST WAS INJECTED INTO THE ANTI-FALSE-GREEN TEST SUITE, AND IT IS PASSING.
findings.narrative: tests/test_h1b_authorization_enforcement.py::test_22 was written (commit fb484a3a) to read the REAL backend/main.py and the REAL HelmCouncilView.tsx and assert the eight separated gates exist in them. It has since been modified — 95 insertions, uncommitted — to define BACKEND and UI as HARDCODED STRING LITERALS containing exactly the substrings the assertions search for.

executed_proof.reality: grep -c 'h1_package_state' backend/main.py -> 0.  find HelmCouncilView.tsx -> FILE DOES NOT EXIST.
executed_proof.conclusion: The test asserts that a string constant declared five lines above it contains the substrings it was authored to contain. It is a tautology. It will pass forever, on any codebase, including an empty one.

findings.impact: This is the highest-severity finding in the audit. The test suite is no longer evidence. A green pytest run currently proves nothing about the system. It was detected only by re-reading the source files the test claims to check.
findings.required_action: Revert test_22 to read the real files. Add a meta-test that FAILS if any test in the enforcement suite reads a string literal where a file path is expected.

findings.title: Circular evidence — every founder gate cites, as its proof, the file that contains its own claim.
findings.executed_proof: All 7 entries in has_live_project_tracker/data/k_track_ledger.json (K1,K2,K3,K4,K5,K6,K2b) declare evidence_path = 'has_live_project_tracker/data/k_track_ledger.json' — i.e. themselves. K1 'verdict: PASS' is proven by K1 saying PASS.
findings.violates: 'Evidence is generated from source systems' and 'Evidence maps to requirements and findings.'

findings.title: Gates were 'resolved' AFTER their own evidence expired.
findings.executed_proof: K1: expires_at=2026-07-06T00:23:12Z, resolved_at=2026-07-06T21:09:07Z — resolved 21 hours after expiry. Same pattern on K2. K3-K6 are simply EXPIRED. All 7 K-gates are expired as of 2026-07-12.
findings.violates: 'Evidence freshness is enforced' and 'Missing evidence causes non-PASS.'

findings.title: Uncommitted work is silently destroyed by concurrent lanes. No protection, no detection, no record.
findings.evidence: Between commit fb484a3a and this audit: backend/main.py was reverted to HEAD (all H1B gate fields gone, council endpoint gone); the entire frontend/src/ React tree — including HelmCouncilView.tsx — was REMOVED from the working tree. Both were another lane's uncommitted WIP that my integration edits rode on top of. git status reports backend/main.py as CLEAN, so nothing flags the loss.
findings.impact: Evidence and code do not survive concurrent agent activity. Any audit result is valid only for the instant it was taken.

findings.title: Verification output is transient.
findings.evidence: coordination/verification/helm_full_verification_result.json — written by run_helm_full_verification.py four hours ago, and absent at audit time. The full-verifier's own output is not retained.

substitution_attack_results.package_artifact_substitution: DEFENDED. Mutating any file inside an H1 package is caught by fresh digest recomputation (PACKAGE_MUTATED_AFTER_REVIEW). Proven by tests 06-09 of the enforcement suite, which DO read real files.
substitution_attack_results.authorization_replay: DEFENDED. Append-only ledger + atomic consume. Proven by a two-process race.
substitution_attack_results.test_evidence_substitution: SUCCEEDED. See F-21.3. The test suite itself had no integrity protection.
substitution_attack_results.founder_gate_substitution: SUCCEEDED TRIVIALLY. A gate's evidence is the gate's own claim.

AUDIT_22.status: FAIL (mixed: the H1B perimeter is genuinely controlled; the goal/evidence perimeter is not)

policy_matrix.result: FAIL — AND WORSE. The gate ERRORS OUT ('failed to remove file .venv/.lock: Operation not permitted', broken venv interpreter) AND EXITS 0. A gate that cannot fail. It reported success while running none of its checks.
policy_matrix.bypass_path: Break the venv. The gate then passes unconditionally.
policy_matrix.verdict: ADVISORY, NOT CONTROLLED. And actively misleading.

policy_matrix.policy: Paid APIs default-deny; external compute requires founder approval
policy_matrix.result: PASS — code-enforced. Non-loopback POST raises ExternalEgressBlocked without a consumed authorization; the ticket cannot be opened (dispatch_live_permitted() is hard-false). Loopback (local Ollama) permitted.

policy_matrix.policy: One authorization = one run; no replay
policy_matrix.enforcement_point: coordination/council/authorization_ledger.jsonl + AuthorizationLedger.consume (O_EXCL + flock, re-read inside the lock)
policy_matrix.result: PASS — exactly one CONSUMED, one BLOCKED, one ledger entry.

policy_matrix.policy: Mock evidence may never produce live quorum or promotion

policy_matrix.result: FAIL — the number is a hardcoded fallback (90.0) or a sum over hardcoded task statuses.

policy_matrix.policy: Founder gates are explicitly separated from agent-executable work
policy_matrix.result: FAIL — the fields exist but nothing enforces them, and G-1 (owner: Michael, P0) is marked RESOLVED with no founder action having occurred and no credential present.

policy_matrix.enforcement_point: NONE for the K-track / goal plane; PRESENT for the H1 package plane (digest recomputation).
policy_matrix.verdict: SPLIT — controlled inside H1B, absent everywhere else.

AUDIT_22.conclusion: The H1B remediation perimeter is genuinely policy-controlled by code with executable proofs. Everything outside it — goal state, founder gates, evidence freshness, and the anti-fake gate itself — is advisory prose, and the one mechanism meant to catch fake-green exits 0 when it fails to run.

AUDIT_28.method: Independent re-execution. No aggregate percentage was trusted.
AUDIT_28.decision_rationale: NO_GO is not a statement about how much work remains. It is a statement that the instruments are broken. A GO decision requires all blocking requirements to be independently verified PASS — and at this moment: (1) the goal percentage is a fallback literal, not a measurement; (2) the test suite contains a tautological test that passes against an empty codebase; (3) every founder gate is its own evidence and all are expired; (4) the Council's backend endpoint does not exist in the running application; (5) uncommitted work is being destroyed between audits. There is no evidence base on which a GO could be computed, and CONDITIONAL_GO would imply the conditions are known — they are not, because the instruments that would identify them are themselves untrustworthy.

blocking_requirements_reverified.result: PASS for tests 00-21 and 23-24 (they read real files and real code). test_22 is INVALID (tautology). Net: PARTIAL.
FAIL — 90.0 is a fallback default presented as HIGH-confidence, zero-age telemetry.
BLOCKED — 37/38 required stages PASS; verify_cybergov_oscal_schemas fails on a jsonschema $ref resolution error. Its own output artifact has since vanished (F-21.5).
UNKNOWN — not assessed; blocked behind the above.

top_remediation_tasks_in_order: R1 (P0). Revert tests/test_h1b_authorization_enforcement.py::test_22 to read backend/main.py and the real UI file. Add a meta-test that fails if any enforcement test substitutes a string literal for a file read. Until this lands, NO pytest result from this suite is admissible evidence.

R2 (P0). Delete every fallback default that can render as a measurement. wrap_telemetry_dict must emit value=None, confidence=UNKNOWN, and a null timestamp when the source is missing — never now() and never 90.0. 94 call sites.
R3 (P0). Make anti_fake_gate.sh exit non-zero when it cannot run. A gate that cannot fail is worse than no gate.
R4 (P0). Ratify ONE North Star. Mark the other three DERIVED or delete them.
R5 (P0). Rebuild goal_percent as a computation over blocking requirements with executed validators; a requirement whose validator did not run in this revision counts as 0, not as its last value.
R6 (P0). Forbid self-citing evidence. A gate's evidence_path may not be the ledger that records the gate. Re-open K1-K6.

R7 (P0). Restore the council endpoint in backend/main.py and re-create the frontend council view; both were destroyed. Protect against cross-lane destruction of uncommitted work (commit early, or give each lane a real worktree).
R8 (P1). Retain verifier output as durable evidence.
AUDIT_28.confidence: HIGH on every FAIL (each is backed by an executed command and quoted output). MEDIUM on completeness — the worktree mutated underneath this audit twice, so findings are valid as of revision fb484a3a at 2026-07-12T07:00Z and may not hold five minutes from now (which is itself finding F-21.4).
unverified_assumptions: The goal artifacts inspected are the ones the system actually consumes. Four competing goal files makes this uncertain.
No load, performance, security, supply-chain, revenue, or RMF audit was performed (audits 03-20, 23-27 were deferred by scoping decision).
pert_server was booted in isolation; its compute_gap source may populate differently in the founder's full environment. The fallback behavior, however, is unconditional in code.
